playbook.book: { "play_settings": { "play_type": "ON_TRIGGER", "trigger": { "type": "EVENT_TRIGGER", "filter": { "match_condition": "ALL", "conditions": [ { "field": "trigger_name", "operator": "==", "value": "FortiGate_Login" } ] }, "change_types": [ "new" ], "render": { "left": 100, "top": 100 } } }, "tasks": [ { "render": { "left": 446, "top": 100 }, "id": "get_current_feed_content", "name": "Get_Current_Feed_Content", "type": "WEBHOOK_POST_REQUEST", "connector_type": "WEBHOOK", "input": { "connector_uuid": { "value": "FMG_API" }, "body": { "value": "{   \"id\": 1,   \"method\": \"get\",   \"params\": [     {       \"url\": \"pm\/config\/global\/_external\/resource\/test_feed.txt\"     }   ],   \"verbose\": 1 }" } }, "category": null, "description": "post request" }, { "render": { "left": 889, "top": 193 }, "id": "update_ip_feed_on_fmg", "name": "Update_IP_Feed_on_FMG", "type": "WEBHOOK_POST_REQUEST", "connector_type": "WEBHOOK", "input": { "connector_uuid": { "value": "FMG_API" }, "body": { "value": "{   \"id\": 2,   \"method\": \"set\",   \"params\": [     {       \"data\": {         \"content\": \"${get_current_feed_content.response.result[0].data.content}\\n${trigger.groupby1}\"       },       \"url\": \"pm\/config\/global\/_external\/resource\/test_feed.txt\"     }   ] }" } }, "category": null, "description": "post request" }, { "render": { "left": 446, "top": 282 }, "id": "check_if_ip_already_exist", "name": "Check_if_IP_already_exist", "type": "LOCALHOST_SWITCH", "connector_type": "LOCALHOST", "input": { "connector_uuid": { "value": "5979abf1-a807-47fd-8aca-c03d3b27c124" }, "conditions": { "value": [ { "label": "IP Check", "branch": "update_ip_feed_on_fmg", "condition": "{%- set feed = get_current_feed_content.response.result[0].data.content | default('') -%}\n{%- set ip = trigger.groupby1 | string | trim -%}\n{{- ip not in feed.splitlines() -}}" } ] }, "fallback": { "value": "ip_already_exist" } }, "category": null, "description": "Conditionally branch to the next task" }, { "render": { "left": 99, "top": 282 }, "id": "src_ip", "name": "src_ip", "type": "LOCALHOST_CREATE_INCIDENT", "connector_type": "LOCALHOST", "input": { "connector_uuid": { "value": "5979abf1-a807-47fd-8aca-c03d3b27c124" }, "mitre_info": { "datatype": "string", "value": "" }, "incident_name": { "value": "Feed_Update_{{trigger.groupby1}}." }, "description": { "value": "Alert Triggered." }, "category": { "value": "CAT1" } }, "category": "CAT1", "description": "Create a new incident." }, { "render": { "left": 446, "top": 454 }, "id": "ip_already_exist", "name": "IP_Already_Exist", "type": "LOCALHOST_UPDATE_INCIDENT", "connector_type": "LOCALHOST", "input": { "connector_uuid": { "value": "5979abf1-a807-47fd-8aca-c03d3b27c124" }, "mitre_info": { "datatype": "string", "value": "" }, "incident_id": { "value": "{{src_ip.incident_id}}" }, "category": { "value": "CAT1" }, "description": { "value": "{{trigger.groupby1}} is already present in the IP Feed List." } }, "category": "CAT1", "description": "Update the existing incident." }, { "render": { "left": 889, "top": 299 }, "id": "ip_added_to_list", "name": "IP_Added_to_List", "type": "LOCALHOST_UPDATE_INCIDENT", "connector_type": "LOCALHOST", "input": { "connector_uuid": { "value": "5979abf1-a807-47fd-8aca-c03d3b27c124" }, "mitre_info": { "datatype": "string", "value": "" }, "incident_id": { "value": "{{src_ip.incident_id}}" }, "category": { "value": "CAT1" }, "description": { "value": "{{trigger.groupby1}} added to IP Feed List." } }, "category": "CAT1", "description": "Update an existing incident." } ], "workflow": [ { "label": "", "name": "workflow_STARTER_to_get_current_feed_content", "source_task": "STARTER", "target_task": "get_current_feed_content" }, { "label": "", "name": "workflow_get_current_feed_content_to_check_if_ip_already_exist", "source_task": "get_current_feed_content", "target_task": "check_if_ip_already_exist" }, { "label": "", "name": "workflow_check_if_ip_already_exist_to_update_ip_feed_on_fmg", "source_task": "check_if_ip_already_exist", "target_task": "update_ip_feed_on_fmg" }, { "label": "", "name": "workflow_STARTER_to_src_ip", "source_task": "STARTER", "target_task": "src_ip" }, { "label": "", "name": "workflow_src_ip_to_check_if_ip_already_exist", "source_task": "src_ip", "target_task": "check_if_ip_already_exist" }, { "label": "", "name": "workflow_check_if_ip_already_exist_to_ip_already_exist", "source_task": "check_if_ip_already_exist", "target_task": "ip_already_exist" }, { "label": "", "name": "workflow_update_ip_feed_on_fmg_to_ip_added_to_list", "source_task": "update_ip_feed_on_fmg", "target_task": "ip_added_to_list" } ] }
playbook.description: Update IP feed hosted on FortiManager when an admin fails to Login to FortiGate.
playbook.name: Update_IP_Feed_on_FortiManager
